summary: PIN Uniqueness Validation Security Fix - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 9/9 pytest tests passed. Frontend: Error message 'Este PIN ya esta asignado a otro usuario activo' displays correctly across all viewports (Desktop 1280px, Mobile Safari iOS 390px, Android Chrome 412px) and themes (Dark Mode, Light Mode).

issues: Console warning: nested button inside button in role selector (line 627-654) - accessibility issue but not blocking functionality

critical_code_review_comments: auth.py line 494-496: create_user correctly checks for existing PIN hash and returns HTTP 409 with 'Este PIN ya está en uso, elige otro'
auth.py line 622-625: update_user correctly checks for existing PIN hash (excluding current user) and returns HTTP 409
auth.py line 253-260: /users/check-pin endpoint correctly validates PIN uniqueness with exclude_user_id support
UserConfig.js line 316-324: Frontend calls /users/check-pin before save and shows error 'Este PIN ya esta asignado a otro usuario activo'
UserConfig.js line 339: Backend error detail is displayed via notify.error(e.response?.data?.detail)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PIN uniqueness validation security fix fully implemented and tested. Backend returns HTTP 409 with message 'Este PIN ya está en uso, elige otro' when creating/editing user with duplicate PIN. Frontend displays error message 'Este PIN ya esta asignado a otro usuario activo' in a modal dialog. All viewports and themes tested successfully.

create_user_with_new_pin.description: Creating user with unique PIN succeeds (HTTP 200/201)

create_user_with_existing_admin_pin.description: Creating user with Admin PIN (1000) returns HTTP 409 with correct error message

create_user_with_existing_oscar_pin.description: Creating user with OSCAR PIN (1111) returns HTTP 409 with correct error message

edit_user_to_another_users_pin.description: Editing user and changing PIN to another user's PIN returns HTTP 409

edit_user_keeping_own_pin.description: Editing user and keeping same PIN succeeds (HTTP 200)

check_pin_endpoint.description: /users/check-pin correctly detects duplicate PINs and supports exclude_user_id

pin_validation_non_numeric.description: Non-numeric PINs are rejected with HTTP 400

pin_validation_leading_zero.description: PINs starting with 0 are rejected with HTTP 400

frontend_error_display.description: Frontend displays error message 'Este PIN ya esta asignado a otro usuario activo' in modal
